data.name: Hentai World Bar
data.detailed_description:
Enter a relaxing and enchanting puzzle journey where each completed level uncovers stunning artwork of charming girls. Gentle background music creates a calm atmosphere while you slide and arrange tiles, gradually revealing every image piece by piece.

Play at your own comfortable pace with no time limits, and enjoy a rewarding feeling of progress as the puzzles slowly become more challenging. Whether you’re a casual player or someone who enjoys puzzle challenges, this game blends relaxation, beauty, and engaging gameplay perfectly.

Features:

Unlock attractive and beautifully illustrated girl artworks at every level

Enjoy soft and relaxing background music while playing

View finished pictures in full-screen mode

Experience puzzles that steadily increase in difficulty

No timers or pressure—just play freely and relax

A relaxing puzzle experience featuring lovely girl artwork, soothing music, unlimited time, and a smooth difficulty curve for calm and enjoyable gameplay.

data.short_description: Relaxing puzzle game where you slide tiles to reveal beautiful girl artwork. Enjoy calming music, no time limits, and gradually challenging levels for a peaceful and satisfying gameplay experience.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 希臘文*, 印尼語*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 俄文, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
